cases.prompt: Audit the design of my live site and tell me if it looks good.

assertions.text: Finds visual inconsistency, spacing issues, hierarchy problems, AI slop patterns, and slow interactions
Iteratively fixes the issues in source code rather than only reporting them
Commits each fix atomically and re-verifies with before/after screenshots

cases.prompt: 사이트 디자인 폴리시 좀 해줘. 간격이랑 위계가 어색해 보여.

assertions.text: Applies a designer's-eye QA pass targeting spacing and visual hierarchy

cases.prompt: I want a design review before I implement anything.

assertions.text: For pre-implementation review, points the user to /plan-design-review instead
